Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Coral cutting

Coral cutting
Main Skill: Woodcutting
Max Efficiency: 200%

Corals, some as big as small trees, surround you. You swing your hatchet at their stumps and chop them down one by one. Unlike trees on the surface, they don't hit the ground but float up instead.

The Coral cutting activity is a Woodcutting activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Kelp Forest in Syrenthia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Woodcutting lvl. 45.

Keyword Requirements:

  • Have Hatchet equipped.
  • Requires [3] Diving gear equipped.

Experience Information

Skill Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Woodcutting 120 120 1.000 1.000 60 2.000 2.000

Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value

Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Nothing N/A 90.000% ~1 in 1 N/A N/A N/A
Sea shell 1 10.000% ~1 in 10 1,200 steps 600 steps 5 (5)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Coral chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,000 steps 15,000 steps
Woodcutting chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 30,000 steps 15,000 steps
